description: The trains that will run on India’s first bullet train corridor will be manufactured indigenously. And that will be a feat for India’s engineering capabilities. A Rs 866.87 crore contract has been awarded to BEML Limited by Integral Coach Factory (ICF) Chennai for manufacturing two prototype bullet train or high-speed train sets.

description: New York City is seeking to ban food delivery platform Motoclick for allegedly paying workers as little as $3.67 per hour, a fraction of the mandated $22.13 minimum wage. City officials filed a motion for a preliminary injunction, aiming to halt the company's operations unless it complies with labor laws.

description: The father of murdered Pune realtor Ketan Agarwal met the Maharashtra CM, demanding the death penalty for the accused. The CM assured a fast-tracked investigation and an SIT formation. Police revealed the victim was pushed from Lohagad Fort after the accused allegedly feared family disrepute if they eloped. Both suspects have confessed to the conspiracy and murder.

Investor Michael Burry repeats warning on Palantir after calling stock ‘a sand castle’
description: Renowned investor Michael Burry has expressed serious concerns about Palantir Technologies, likening its stock to a "sand castle" amid a significant downturn.  He noted a "new lower low" with declining trading volume, suggesting a prolonged downtrend.  This comes as Palantir, once an AI darling, faces investor skepticism over its valuation.  Meanwhile, Burry has increased his stake in China's Alibaba, seeing it as an undervalued AI leader.

title: Bill Gates admits to the House panel that he had at least three extramarital affairs
description: Bill Gates revealed to Congress that Jeffrey Epstein attempted to leverage knowledge of Gates' extramarital affairs to re-establish contact after Gates sought to end their association. While no direct threats were made, Epstein allegedly used intermediaries for veiled warnings and explored blackmail tactics. Gates acknowledged past affairs, emphasizing Epstein's lack of involvement and that he only learned of them post-professional ties.
